description:
Wouldn't it be wonderful if there was something simple that could help our planet and our health at the same time?

Well conveniently there is.

What we eat. 

Really. Because one plate made up of more fruit and veg isn't just better for you, it's better for the planet too. 

Marvellous. 

So what are we waiting for? 

Let's eat like the world depends on it. One plate at a time.

Now, what's for dinner?

To find out more please visit www.sainsburys.co.uk/shop/gb/groceries/dietary-and-lifestyle/eat-better
